domain: Caucasian Georgian polyphony (UNESCO Intangible Heritage 2001/2008): 3-voice mzakhri (high) + zhir (middle) + bani (low/drone bass); Georgian Triad C-F-G (perfect 4th + 2nd on top dissonant); sharp dissonant intervals 2nd/4th/7th/9th characteristic; Kakhetian table-song bani-drone + 2 melismatic voices; Guria highly free individual lines; Ioane Petritsi 11th century Trinity-symbolism
specific_mechanism: GEORGIAN-3-VOICE-TRIAD-DISSONANT-SPECTRAL-ALLOCATION: per-attention-head 3-voice spectral allocation with (1) 3-voice-band attention-head partition K_3-voice: K heads partitioned into 3 voice-groups K_mzakhri (high-pitch long-range tokens) + K_zhir (mid-pitch medium-range) + K_bani (low-pitch drone context-anchor); (2) Georgian-Triad C-F-G dissonant anchor frequencies: 3 fixed RoPE anchor positions at C-F-G interval (1.5:2.0 period ratio + 2nd-on-top dissonance); (3) drone-bani fixed-frequency anchor: bani-group heads use single fixed base-frequency θ_bani; never modulates with position; serves as context-anchor sink; (4) 2 melismatic voices free: mzakhri+zhir heads use adaptive position-modulating RoPE with allowed swing over dissonant interval; (5) 2-4-7-9 interval-cluster regularizer L_diss: reward for attention concentration at 2nd/4th/7th/9th periodic positions; penalty on consonant-3rd/5th/6th. Differs from R507 SYRIAC-OKTOECHOS-8-BAND (8-band weekly mode + Beth Gazo template + epoch-boundary restart) and R532 GUQIN-7-STRING-13-HUI-3-MODE-HARMONIC-NODE-ALLOCATION (7×13 grid + 3-mode san/an/fan + half-hui interpolation + 91-position lookup + mode-router) by 3-voice band partition (high/mid/low not 7-string) + Georgian-Triad anchors at dissonant intervals + drone-bani fixed-frequency context-anchor + 2-melismatic free RoPE + 2-4-7-9 dissonant-cluster regularizer.
llm_application: GEORGIAN-3-VOICE-TRIAD-DISSONANT-SPECTRAL-ALLOCATION per-attention-head 3-voice spectral allocation + K_mzakhri K_zhir K_bani 3-band partition + Georgian-Triad C-F-G 3-fixed-anchor + drone-bani fixed-frequency context-anchor sink + 2-melismatic-voices free adaptive RoPE swing + 2-4-7-9 dissonant interval-cluster regularizer L_diss reward-on-dissonant-positions penalty-on-consonant. Differs from R402. R416. R431. R440. R457. R468. R279. R482. R495. R507 SYRIAC-OKTOECHOS (closest — 8-band weekly + Beth Gazo template). R532 GUQIN-7-STRING-13-HUI (closest — 7×13 + 3-mode + half-hui). Differs from Frequency Bands RoPE + Mixed-Frequency + Hallucination Spectral Features + Harmonizer by 3-voice + Triad + drone-bani + 2-melismatic + dissonant regularizer. Differs by 3-VOICE BAND PARTITION + GEORGIAN-TRIAD C-F-G ANCHORS + DRONE-BANI FIXED-FREQUENCY SINK + 2-MELISMATIC FREE ROPE + 2-4-7-9 DISSONANT REGULARIZER.
novelty_claim: Frequency Bands RoPE ICLR 2026 + Mixed-Frequency RoPE + Hallucination Spectral 2502.17598 + Harmonizer 2025 cover spectral-allocation + per-head frequency space. GEORGIAN-3-VOICE-TRIAD-DISSONANT-SPECTRAL-ALLOCATION adds (a) 3-voice band partition + (b) Georgian-Triad dissonant anchors + (c) drone-bani fixed-frequency sink + (d) 2-melismatic free + (e) 2-4-7-9 dissonant regularizer. Recombination — borderline lookup.
